## PR Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please verify the following:

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] This is not a purely promotional submission. The API has a genuine free tier.
- [ ] I have updated the Markdown table with the correct format.
- [ ] (Optional but appreciated) I have updated the README in other languages (e.g., `README.zh-CN.md`) if applicable.
- [ ] I have verified that all links provided are working.
